summary: Completed testing of Deterministic Line Extraction (Zero GPT) features - Iteration 22. All features verified: 1) POST /api/parse-lines extracts character lines deterministically without GPT. 2) cue_recall format correct with cue (previous speaker's line) and your_line. 3) Edge cases handled: (V.O.), (CONT'D), multiple consecutive lines, parentheticals skipped. 4) Frontend ScriptOverview has 3 view tabs: My Lines, Full Scene, Breakdown. 5) For booked role, My Lines is default view. 6) My Lines view shows correct line count, cue text (italic/dimmed), and your_line (bright).

Backend: parse-lines returns correct cue_recall with cue and your_line - PASS

Backend: parse-lines skips scene headings (INT./EXT.) - PASS

server.py lines 1670-1678: POST /api/parse-lines endpoint returns correct structure
server.py lines 801-807: analyze/text overrides GPT memorization with deterministic extraction
server.py lines 1586-1589: analyze/scene overrides GPT memorization with deterministic extraction

seed_data_creation: Used existing Felix script (21 scenes, booked mode) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deterministic line extraction feature fully implemented and tested. Key flows: 1) POST /api/parse-lines accepts {text, character_name} and returns {character_name, line_count, memorization: {chunked_lines, cue_recall}}. 2) cue_recall format: {cue: previous speaker's line or '(Scene start)', your_line: character's dialogue}. 3) Both analyze/text and analyze/scene override GPT memorization with deterministic extraction. 4) Frontend ScriptOverview has 3 view tabs: 'lines' (My Lines), 'fulltext' (Full Scene), 'breakdown' (AI Analysis). 5) For booked role (prepMode='booked'), My Lines is default view. 6) My Lines view shows cue_recall cards with CUE label (dimmed/italic) and YOUR LINE label (bright).

parse_lines_endpoint.details: POST /api/parse-lines extracts character lines deterministically without GPT calls

cue_recall_format.details: Returns {cue: previous speaker's line, your_line: character's dialogue} for each line

chunked_lines_grouping.details: Groups lines in chunks of 3 with chunk_label and lines fields

edge_cases_vo_contd.details: Handles (V.O.), (CONT'D), multiple consecutive lines, parentheticals skipped

deterministic_override_analyze_text.details: analyze/text overrides GPT memorization with deterministic extraction after GPT call

deterministic_override_analyze_scene.details: analyze/scene overrides GPT memorization with deterministic extraction after GPT call

frontend_view_tabs.details: ScriptOverview has 3 tabs: My Lines, Full Scene, Breakdown with correct data-testid

booked_role_default_view.details: For prepMode='booked', My Lines tab is active by default

my_lines_view_format.details: Shows cue_recall cards with CUE (italic/dimmed) and YOUR LINE (bright) labels

full_scene_view.details: Shows raw scene text in pre element with mono font

memorize_run_lines_buttons.details: My Lines view has Memorize and Run Lines buttons

lines_first_hero_card.details: Booked role shows hero card with line count and quick action buttons
